task_completion.description: Navigate to the download manager in the Avare app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Avare application's Download screen or manager is visible.

task_completion.description: Download the approach plate data for the San Francisco region
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the download list, 'San Francisco' (under plates or charts) is selected, downloading, or marked as downloaded.
The 'Plates' tab, button, or viewer interface is active in the Avare app.

task_completion.description: Search for or select KSFO in the Plates viewer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The identifier 'KSFO' is entered into the search bar or selected from a dropdown/list within the Plates viewer.

task_completion.description: Display the Airport Diagram or approach plate for KSFO
task_completion.visual_evidence: An aeronautical chart graphic is displayed on the screen containing the text 'KSFO', 'SAN FRANCISCO', and 'AIRPORT DIAGRAM'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Avare application to view the plate
integrity.visual_evidence: The plate is displayed within the Avare app interface (com.ds.avare), not in a web browser, generic image gallery, or file explorer.

integrity.description: The agent downloaded the data via the app's GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Avare Download menu, rather than terminal windows using curl/wget to fetch files.

integrity.description: The displayed diagram is a genuine graphical chart
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected text ('KSFO', 'SAN FRANCISCO', 'AIRPORT DIAGRAM') is embedded within a graphical aeronautical chart, not typed into a text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target app is Avare (package com.ds.avare). The target airport is San Francisco International Airport, officially identified as KSFO. The agent must download approach plates for the San Francisco region. The official FAA Terminal Procedures Publication terminology for the required diagram is 'AIRPORT DIAGRAM'. When successfully displayed in the Avare Plates viewer, the screen should show an aeronautical chart graphic containing the text 'KSFO', 'SAN FRANCISCO', and 'AIRPORT DIAGRAM'.
